title: Error on normal comment starting with Verilator

features.name: comment with verilator prefix but no valid directive
features.description: Code should include a single-line comment that starts with 'Verilator' followed by text that is not a recognized directive
features.snippet: // Verilator does not support class in generate block yet

features.name: block comment with verilator prefix but no valid directive
features.description: Code should include a multi-line block comment that starts with 'Verilator' followed by text that is not a recognized directive
features.snippet: /*Verilator does not support class in generate block yet*/

features.name: conditional generate with verilator comment prefix
features.description: Code should include a conditional generate block guarded by VERILATOR preprocessor check, with a comment starting with Verilator that is not a directive
